---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---
# Libraries
```{r, warning=FALSE}
library(targets)
library(tidyverse)
library(visNetwork)
```


```{r}
#setwd(dirname(rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
setwd(this.path::this.dir())
getwd()
```

# Check pipeline status
```{r}
tar_glimpse()
```


```{r}
tar_visnetwork()
```

```{r}
tar_visnetwork(targets_only = TRUE)
```

```{r}
tar_manifest()
tar_manifest(fields = name)$name
```

# Construct pipeline
```{r}
# targets::tar_make(callr_function = NULL) # for debugging
targets::tar_make()
```

# Destroy pipeline (off by default)
```{r, warning=FALSE, eval = FALSE }
tar_destroy()
# targets::tar_destroy(ask = FALSE)
# targets::tar_invalidate(list_observed_clean)
```


# Get soil parameters in json format
```{r}
tar_load(df_apsimStageInput)
tar_load(list_observed_dfs)
tar_load(df_maxLeafDate)
tar_load(df_haun_pheno_dates)
tar_load(df_obs_info)
tar_load(df_simNameByCult)
tar_load(df_list_PCDS)
tar_load(df_PCDS_int)
tar_load(df_dateStageTargetReached)
tar_load(df_final_observed_harv)
tar_load(df_apsimStageInput_haunBased)
tar_load(list_observed_clean)
tar_load(df_stages_Observ)
tar_load(list_observed_clean_final)
tar_load(df_stages_Observ)
tar_load(list_observed_clean_final)
x<- tar_read(list_observed_dfs)
names(x)
targets::tar_invalidate(list_observed_dfs)
tar_load(df_list_PCDS)


```

```{r}
tar_load(df_stages_Observ)
tar_load(list_observed_clean_stage)
tar_load(df_soil_water)
tar_load(json_soil_water)
tar_read(json_soil_water)
tar_load(df_apsimStageInput)
tar_load(df_haun_pheno_dates)
tar_load(df_apsimStageInput_haunBased)
tar_load(df_stages_Observ)
tar_read(list_observed_clean_stage)
tar_load(list_observed_clean)
tar_load(df_final_observed)
tar_load(df_obs_meta_data)
```

```{r}
tar_load(list_observed_dfs)
tar_load(list_observed_clean)
```

```{r}
tar_load(list_observed_dfs)
tar_load(list_pcds_extracted)
tar_load(df_pheno_input_param)
tar_load(df_pheno_raw)
tar_load(df_pheno_int)
tar_load(df_pheno_haun)
tar_load(df_pheno_final)
tar_load(list_observed_clean)

```

```{r}
tar_load(df_obs_wide)
tar_load(df_pheno_final)
tar_load(df_obs_plus_pheno)
tar_load(df_obs_plus_pheno_harv)
tar_read(qc_apsim_observed_harv)
dput(names(readxl::read_excel("2024_WaggaWagga_PHDA24WARI2.xlsx", sheet = "PCDS 10.0 harvest")))
getwd()
```

```{r}
tar_load(list_observed_dfs)
```

```{r}
tar_load(df_pheno_raw)  
tar_load(df_pheno_int)
tar_load(df_pheno_haun)
tar_load(list_observed_dfs)
```
